full.sec: A.1 Unbiased Estimate of the Simple Noise Scale with No Overhead
full.secZh: A.1 无开销的简单噪声尺度无偏估计

items.en: In this section, we describe a method for measuring the noise scale that comes essentially for free in a data-parallel training environment.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们描述了一种在数据并行训练环境中几乎免费测量噪声尺度的方法。

items.en: We estimate the noise scale by comparing the norm of the gradient for different batch sizes. From Equation 2.2, the expected gradient norm for a batch of size B𝐵B is given by:
items.zh: 我们通过比较不同批量大小的梯度范数来估计噪声尺度。根据方程2.2，大小为B的批次的期望梯度范数由下式给出：

items.en: Given estimates of |Gest|2superscriptsubscript𝐺est2|G_{{\rm est}}|^{2} for both B=Bsmall𝐵subscript𝐵smallB=B_{{\rm small}} and B=Bbig𝐵subscript𝐵bigB=B_{{\rm big}}, we can obtain unbiased estimates |𝒢|2superscript𝒢2|\mathcal{G}|^{2} and 𝒮𝒮\mathcal{S} for |G|2superscript𝐺2|G|^{2} and tr​(Σ)trΣ{\rm tr}(\Sigma), respectively:
items.zh: 给定对于B=Bsmall和B=Bbig的|Gest|^2的估计，我们可以获得|G|^2和tr(Σ)的无偏估计|𝒢|^2和𝒮：

items.en: We can verify with Equation A.1 that 𝔼​[|𝒢|2]=|G|2𝔼delimited-[]superscript𝒢2superscript𝐺2\mathbb{E}\left[|\mathcal{G}|^{2}\right]=|G|^{2} and 𝔼​[𝒮]=tr​(Σ)𝔼delimited-[]𝒮trΣ\mathbb{E}\left[\mathcal{S}\right]={\rm tr}(\Sigma).999Note that when Bsmall=1subscript𝐵small1B_{{\rm small}}=1 and Bbig=nsubscript𝐵big𝑛B_{{\rm big}}=n, this becomes the familiar Bessel correction nn−1𝑛𝑛1\frac{n}{n-1} to the sample variance.
items.zh: 我们可以用方程A.1验证𝔼[|𝒢|^2]=|G|^2和𝔼[𝒮]=tr(Σ)。999注意，当Bsmall=1且Bbig=n时，这变成了熟悉的Bessel校正n/(n-1)到样本方差。

items.en: Note that the ratio 𝒮/|𝒢|2𝒮superscript𝒢2\mathcal{S}/|\mathcal{G}|^{2} is not an unbiased estimator for ℬnoisesubscriptℬnoise\mathcal{B}_{{\rm noise}}101010In fact 𝔼​[x/y]≥𝔼​[x]/𝔼​[y]𝔼delimited-[]𝑥𝑦𝔼delimited-[]𝑥𝔼delimited-[]𝑦\mathbb{E}\left[x/y\right]\geq\mathbb{E}\left[x\right]/\mathbb{E}\left[y\right] in general for positive variables, see e.g. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ratio_estimator for details.. It is possible to correct for this bias, but to minimize complexity we instead ensure that |𝒢|2superscript𝒢2|\mathcal{G}|^{2} has relatively low variance by averaging over many batches. This is especially important due to the precise cancellation involved in the definition of |𝒢|2superscript𝒢2|\mathcal{G}|^{2}.
items.zh: 注意，比值𝒮/|𝒢|^2不是ℬnoise的无偏估计量1010事实上，对于正变量，通常有𝔼[x/y]≥𝔼[x]/𝔼[y]，详见https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ratio_estimator。可以纠正这种偏差，但为了最小化复杂性，我们通过平均多个批次来确保|𝒢|^2具有相对较低的方差。由于|𝒢|^2定义中涉及的精确抵消，这一点尤其重要。

items.en: When training a model using a data parallel method, we can compute |GBsmall|2superscriptsubscript𝐺subscript𝐵small2|G_{B_{{\rm small}}}|^{2} and |GBbig|2superscriptsubscript𝐺subscript𝐵big2|G_{B_{{\rm big}}}|^{2} with minimal effort by computing the norm of gradient before and after averaging between devices. In that case Bsmallsubscript𝐵smallB_{{\rm small}} is the “local” batch size before averaging, and Bbigsubscript𝐵bigB_{{\rm big}} is the “global” batch size after averaging.
items.zh: 当使用数据并行方法训练模型时，我们可以通过计算设备间平均前后的梯度范数来轻松计算|GBsmall|^2和|GBbig|^2。在这种情况下，Bsmall是平均前的“局部”批量大小，Bbig是平均后的“全局”批量大小。

items.en: In practice, to account for the noisiness of |𝒢|2superscript𝒢2|\mathcal{G}|^{2} when computed this way, we calculate |𝒢|2superscript𝒢2|\mathcal{G}|^{2} and 𝒮𝒮\mathcal{S} on every training step and use their values to compute separate exponentially-weighted moving averages. We tune the exponential decay parameters so that the estimates are stable. Then, the ratio of the moving averages provides a good estimate of the noise scale.
items.zh: 在实践中，为了考虑以这种方式计算的|𝒢|^2的噪声，我们在每个训练步骤计算|𝒢|^2和𝒮，并使用它们的值计算单独的指数加权移动平均。我们调整指数衰减参数以使估计稳定。然后，移动平均的比值提供了噪声尺度的良好估计。

items.en: In our experiments we measure and report the noise scale during training for a single run with a well-optimized learning rate. Note that while the noise scale measurement is consistent between runs at different batch sizes, it is not consistent at different learning rates (see Appendix C). So, it is important to use a run with a well-tuned learning rate in order to get a meaningful noise scale measurement.
items.zh: 在我们的实验中，我们测量并报告了在具有良好优化学习率的单次运行中训练期间的噪声尺度。请注意，虽然噪声尺度测量在不同批量大小的运行之间是一致的，但在不同学习率下并不一致（见附录C）。因此，为了获得有意义的噪声尺度测量，使用具有良好调整学习率的运行很重要。

full.sec: A.2 Systematic Searches Over Batch Sizes
full.secZh: A.2 批次大小的系统搜索

items.en: When doing systematic measurements of how performance scales with batch size (Pareto fronts), we separately tune the learning rate at each batch size, in order to approximate the ideal batch scaling curve as closely as possible. We tune the learning rate via the following procedure. For each task, we performed a coarse grid search over both batch size and learning rate to determine reasonable bounds for a fine-grained search. The central value typically followed the form
items.zh: 当进行性能如何随批量大小缩放（帕累托前沿）的系统测量时，我们分别调整每个批量大小的学习率，以尽可能接近理想的批量缩放曲线。我们通过以下过程调整学习率。对于每个任务，我们执行批量大小和学习率的粗略网格搜索，以确定细粒度搜索的合理范围。中心值通常遵循以下形式

items.en: where α=1𝛼1\alpha=1 for SGD or momentum, and 0.5<α<10.5𝛼10.5<\alpha<1 for Adam [KB14] or RMSProp. Then, we performed an independent grid search for each batch size centered at ϵcentralsubscriptitalic-ϵcentral\epsilon_{{\rm central}}, expanding the bounds of the search if the best value was on the edge of the range.
items.zh: 其中对于SGD或动量，α=1；对于Adam [KB14]或RMSProp，0.5<α<1。然后，我们对每个批量大小执行独立的网格搜索，以ϵcentral为中心，如果最佳值在范围边缘，则扩展搜索范围。

items.en: We explain the motivation for Equation A.3 in Appendix E.2. But regardless of the theoretical motivations, we have found that this scaling rule provides a reasonable starting point for grid searches, though we are not suggesting that they produce precisely optimized learning rates.
items.zh: 我们在附录E.2中解释了方程A.3的动机。但无论理论动机如何，我们发现这个缩放规则为网格搜索提供了一个合理的起点，尽管我们并不建议它们产生精确优化的学习率。

items.en: To produce the Pareto front plots, and thus to measure the important parameter ℬcritsubscriptℬcrit{\cal B}_{\rm crit} for a given dataset and optimizer, we begin by performing a grid search over batch sizes and learning rates, as described in Appendix A.2. With that data in hand, we fix a list of goal values – either loss, perplexity, or game-score. For example for SVHN in Figure 7 we chose the training classification error values [0.2,0.1,0.07,0.05,0.035,0.025,0.015,0.004]0.20.10.070.050.0350.0250.0150.004[0.2,0.1,0.07,0.05,0.035,0.025,0.015,0.004] as the goals. These were generally chosen to provide a variety of evenly spaced Pareto fronts indicative of optimization progress.
items.zh: 为了生成帕累托前沿图，从而测量给定数据集和优化器的重要参数ℬcrit，我们首先按照附录A.2所述进行批量大小和学习率的网格搜索。有了这些数据，我们固定一个目标值列表——可以是损失、困惑度或游戏得分。例如，对于图7中的SVHN，我们选择训练分类误差值[0.2,0.1,0.07,0.05,0.035,0.025,0.015,0.004]作为目标。这些通常被选择以提供各种均匀间隔的帕累托前沿，指示优化进展。

items.en: Then for each value of the goal, and for each value of the batch size, we identified the number of optimization steps and examples processed for the run (among those in the grid search) that achieved that goal most quickly. These optimal runs are the data points on the Pareto front plots. Note that at fixed batch size, different values of the learning rate might be optimal for different values of the goal (this was certainly the case for LSTMs on Billion Word, for example). Next, for each value of the goal, we used the optimal runs at each value of the batch size to fit Equation 2.11 to the relation between examples processed and optimization steps. Note that we performed the fits and extracted the errors in log-space. This was how we produced the lines on the Pareto front plots.
items.zh: 然后，对于每个目标值和每个批量大小，我们确定（在网格搜索中）最快达到该目标的运行所需的优化步数和处理的样本数。这些最优运行是帕累托前沿图上的数据点。请注意，在固定批量大小下，不同的学习率值可能对不同的目标值最优（例如，对于Billion Word上的LSTM，情况确实如此）。接下来，对于每个目标值，我们使用每个批量大小的最优运行来拟合方程2.11，以建立处理样本数与优化步数之间的关系。请注意，我们在对数空间中执行拟合并提取误差。这就是我们如何在帕累托前沿图上生成线条。

items.en: Finally, given this fit, we directly measured ℬcrit=EminSminsubscriptℬcritsubscript𝐸minsubscript𝑆min{\cal B}_{\rm crit}=\frac{E_{\rm min}}{S_{\rm min}} for each value of the goal, as well as the standard error in this quantity. This was how we produced the ‘Noise Scale Comparison’ plots, where we compared ℬcritsubscriptℬcrit{\cal B}_{\rm crit} to ℬsimplesubscriptℬsimple{\cal B}_{\rm simple}. Errors in ℬcritsubscriptℬcrit{\cal B}_{\rm crit} are standard errors from the fit to Equation 2.11. When we report an overall number for ℬcritsubscriptℬcrit{\cal B}_{\rm crit} for a given dataset and optimizer, we are averaging over optimization steps throughout training.
items.zh: 最后，给定这个拟合，我们直接测量每个目标值的ℬcrit = Emin/Smin，以及该量的标准误差。这就是我们如何生成“噪声尺度比较”图，其中我们将ℬcrit与ℬsimple进行比较。ℬcrit的误差来自方程2.11拟合的标准误差。当我们报告给定数据集和优化器的ℬcrit总体数值时，我们是在训练过程中对优化步数进行平均。

items.en: Note that it can be difficult to determine at what point in a training run the model’s performance reaches the specified target. For example, the loss may oscillate significantly, entering and exiting the target region multiple times. To remedy this issue, we smooth the loss using an exponentially-weighted moving average before checking whether it has reached the target. The decay parameter of this moving average can affect results noticeably. Though we choose this parameter by hand based on the noisiness of the model’s performance, this could be automated using an adaptive smoothing algorithm.
items.zh: 请注意，确定训练运行中模型性能何时达到指定目标可能很困难。例如，损失可能显著振荡，多次进入和退出目标区域。为了解决这个问题，我们在检查损失是否达到目标之前，使用指数加权移动平均对损失进行平滑。这个移动平均的衰减参数可能会显著影响结果。尽管我们根据模型性能的噪声程度手动选择此参数，但可以使用自适应平滑算法自动执行此操作。

items.en: We train a variety of architectures on a variety of ML tasks described below. We use either basic stochastic gradient descent (SGD), SGD with momentum [SMDH13], or the Adam optimizer [KB14] unless otherwise specified. We measure and report the noise scale ℬsimplesubscriptℬsimple{\cal B}_{\rm simple} during training for a single run of each task with a well-optimized learning rate.
items.zh: 我们在下面描述的各种机器学习任务上训练各种架构。除非另有说明，我们使用基本的随机梯度下降（SGD）、带动量的SGD [SMDH13]或Adam优化器[KB14]。我们测量并报告每个任务在具有良好优化学习率的单次运行中训练期间的噪声尺度ℬsimple。

items.en: For image classification, we use the following datasets:
items.zh: 对于图像分类，我们使用以下数据集：

items.en: Street View House Numbers (SVHN) [NWC+11]
items.zh: 街景门牌号码（SVHN）[NWC+11]

items.en: For CIFAR10 and ImageNet classification, we use Residual Networks [HZRS15] of size 32 and 50 respectively, based on the TensorFlow Models implementation [Goo]. All hyperparameters are unchanged aside from the learning rate schedule; Instead of decaying the learning rate by a factor of 10 at specified epochs, we decay by a factor of 10 when the training classification error (appropriately smoothed) reaches 0.487, 0.312, and 0.229. For MNIST and SVHN, we use a simple deep network with two sets of convolutional and pooling layers (32 and 64 filters, respectively, with 5x5 filters), one fully-connected hidden layer with 1024 units, and a final dropout layer with dropout rate of 0.4.
items.zh: 对于CIFAR10和ImageNet分类，我们分别使用大小为32和50的残差网络[HZRS15]，基于TensorFlow Models实现[Goo]。除学习率调度外，所有超参数保持不变；我们不在指定epoch将学习率衰减10倍，而是在训练分类误差（适当平滑后）达到0.487、0.312和0.229时衰减10倍。对于MNIST和SVHN，我们使用一个简单的深度网络，包含两组卷积和池化层（分别有32和64个5x5滤波器）、一个包含1024个单元的全连接隐藏层，以及一个dropout率为0.4的最终dropout层。

items.en: We train MNIST models using SGD, SVHN with both SGD and Adam [KB14] (with the default parameter settings momentum =0.9absent0.9=0.9, β2=0.999subscript𝛽20.999\beta_{2}=0.999), and CIFAR10 and ImageNet with momentum [SMDH13] (with momentum =0.9absent0.9=0.9).
items.zh: 我们使用SGD训练MNIST模型，使用SGD和Adam [KB14]（默认参数设置：动量=0.9，β2=0.999）训练SVHN，使用动量[SMDH13]（动量=0.9）训练CIFAR10和ImageNet。

items.en: For reinforcement learning, we use the following tasks via OpenAI Gym [BCP+16]:
items.zh: 对于强化学习，我们通过OpenAI Gym [BCP+16]使用以下任务：

items.en: Atari Arcade Learning Environment [BNVB12]
items.zh: Atari街机学习环境[BNVB12]

items.en: For Atari, we use A2C [MBM+16] with a pure convolutional policy, adapted from OpenAI Baselines [DHK+17]. We train using RMSProp with α=0.99𝛼0.99\alpha=0.99 and ϵ=10−5italic-ϵsuperscript105\epsilon=10^{-5}. We roll out the environments 5 steps at a time, and vary the batch size by varying the number of environments running parallel. At the beginning of training, we randomly step each parallel environment by a random number of steps up to 500, as suggested in [SA18].
items.zh: 对于Atari，我们使用A2C [MBM+16]和纯卷积策略，改编自OpenAI Baselines [DHK+17]。我们使用RMSProp训练，α=0.99，ϵ=10⁻⁵。我们每次展开环境5步，并通过改变并行运行的环境数量来改变批量大小。训练开始时，我们按照[SA18]的建议，随机将每个并行环境随机步进最多500步。

items.en: As described in [BCD+18] for Dota an asynchronous version of PPO [SWD+17] was used. The TrueSkill metric [HMG07] was used to measure the skill of an agent. Given the fact that the OpenAI Five effort is ongoing, the values for TrueSkill reported in this paper are incomparable with those in [BCD+18]; on this paper’s scale, TrueSkill 50 is roughly the level of the best semi-pro players.
items.zh: 如[BCD+18]所述，对于Dota，使用了PPO [SWD+17]的异步版本。TrueSkill指标[HMG07]用于衡量智能体的技能。鉴于OpenAI Five的工作仍在进行中，本文报告的TrueSkill值与[BCD+18]中的值不可比较；按本文的尺度，TrueSkill 50大致相当于最佳半职业选手的水平。

items.en: For language modeling, we train a size-2048 LSTM [HS97] on the One Billion Word Benchmark corpus [CMS+13], using byte pair encoding (BPE) [SHB15] with a vocabulary of size 40,000 and a 512512512-dimensional embedding space. The LSTMs were trained with Adam using momentum 0.50.50.5, without dropout, with the gradients clipped to norm 10, and with 202020-token sequences. For both training and evaluation LSTM cell states were reset to zero between samples, and so we have reported perplexity for the last token of the 20-token sequences. We chose to report the batch size in tokens (rather than sequences) because we have found that when the number of sequences and the sequence lengths are varied, both ℬsimplesubscriptℬsimple{\cal B}_{\rm simple} and ℬcritsubscriptℬcrit{\cal B}_{\rm crit} depend predominantly on the total number of tokens.
items.zh: 对于语言建模，我们在十亿词基准语料库[CMS+13]上训练了一个大小为2048的LSTM [HS97]，使用字节对编码（BPE）[SHB15]，词汇表大小为40,000，嵌入空间维度为512。LSTM使用Adam训练，动量0.5，无dropout，梯度裁剪到范数10，序列长度为20个token。在训练和评估中，LSTM细胞状态在样本之间重置为零，因此我们报告了20-token序列最后一个token的困惑度。我们选择以token（而非序列）为单位报告批量大小，因为我们发现当序列数量和序列长度变化时，ℬ_simple和ℬ_crit主要取决于总token数。

items.en: We also trained 1024 and 512 size LSTMs for model size comparison; for the last we used a smaller 256256256-dimensional embedding space. The model size comparison training runs were conducted with a batch size of 102410241024 and Adam learning rate of 0.00070.00070.0007. The learning rates were chosen from a grid search, which showed that the optimal learning rate did not have a significant dependence on model size.
items.zh: 我们还训练了大小为1024和512的LSTM用于模型大小比较；对于后者，我们使用了较小的256维嵌入空间。模型大小比较的训练运行使用批量大小1024和Adam学习率0.0007。学习率通过网格搜索选择，结果显示最优学习率对模型大小没有显著依赖。

items.en: For generative image modeling, we train a Variational Autoencoder [KW13] using the InfoGAN architecture [CDH+16] (see their appendix C.2) on the SVHN dataset. Since VAEs introduce additional stochasticity beyond gradient noise, we also provide training data on a simple autoencoder with the same architecture.
items.zh: 对于生成式图像建模，我们在SVHN数据集上使用InfoGAN架构[CDH+16]（见其附录C.2）训练变分自编码器[KW13]。由于VAE引入了超出梯度噪声的额外随机性，我们还提供了相同架构的简单自编码器的训练数据。

full.sec: Appendix B Results for All Tasks
full.secZh: 附录B 所有任务的结果

items.en: In Figures 9, 10, 11, 12, 13, and 14, we display the results of a series of training runs for for classification, reinforcement learning, and generative modeling tasks. On the left, we show tradeoff curves between compute-efficiency and time-efficiency. Each point on each tradeoff curve represents the number of optimizer steps and processed training examples necessary to reach a given level of performance for a particular training run. Fits to the prediction of Equation 2.11 are shown. On the right, we compare the critical batch size, defined as the point where training is within 50% of maximum efficiency in terms of both compute power and speed, and compare to the simple noise scale ℬsimplesubscriptℬsimple\mathcal{B}_{{\rm simple}} of Equation 2.9 and the true noise scale ℬnoisesubscriptℬnoise\mathcal{B}_{{\rm noise}} of 2.8, when available. The results are summarized in Figure 4 and table 1.

full.sec: Appendix C Temperature and the Noise Scale
full.secZh: 附录C 温度与噪声尺度

items.en: The noise scale measured during neural network training could depend on a variety of hyperparameters, such as the learning rate ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon or momentum. However, we have empirically found that noise scale primarily depends on ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon and B𝐵B roughly through the ratio
items.zh: 神经网络训练期间测量的噪声尺度可能依赖于多种超参数，例如学习率ϵ或动量。然而，我们经验发现噪声尺度主要取决于ϵ和B，大致通过比值

items.en: which we refer to as the ‘temperature’ of training. The terminology reflects an idea of the loss as a potential energy function, so that high temperature training explores a larger range of energies.
items.zh: 我们称之为训练的“温度”。这一术语反映了将损失视为势能函数的思想，因此高温训练探索更大范围的能量。

items.en: In the case of pure SGD it is approximated by T≈ϵ/B𝑇italic-ϵ𝐵T\approx\epsilon/B in the small batch regime. Our definition of T𝑇T can then be obtained from a toy model of a quadratic loss, which is described below. In that case one can show explicitly [MHB17] that the equilibrium distribution of gradients is characterized by this temperature111111This definition can also be motivated by the empirical results of [SKYL17], which show that decaying the learning rate and increasing the batch size by the same factor have the same effect on training in the small-batch regime..
items.zh: 在纯 SGD 的情况下，小批量区域中近似为 T≈ϵ/B。我们对 T 的定义可以从一个二次损失的玩具模型中得到，如下所述。在这种情况下，可以明确证明 [MHB17] 梯度的平衡分布由该温度表征111111该定义也可由 [SKYL17] 的实证结果支持，该结果表明在小批量区域中，以相同因子衰减学习率和增加批量大小对训练有相同的影响。

items.capEn: Figure 15: The noise scale is proportional to the inverse temperature. On the left we display results for SVHN optimized via SGD, while on the right we have an LSTM on the Billion Word dataset optimized via Adam. For each of the three curves, we modified either the learning rate ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon, the batch size B𝐵B, or both, so that the temperature ϵBitalic-ϵ𝐵\frac{\epsilon}{B} was decreased by a factor of 161616 between epochs 111 and 1.51.51.5 (SVHN) or 0.020.020.02 and 0.030.030.03 (BW). In all cases we see that the simple noise scale increased by a factor of 161616, then returned to roughly its original value once ϵ,Bitalic-ϵ𝐵\epsilon,B were reset.
items.capZh: 图 15：噪声尺度与逆温度成正比。左侧展示了通过 SGD 优化的 SVHN 结果，右侧展示了通过 Adam 优化的 Billion Word 数据集上的 LSTM。对于三条曲线中的每一条，我们修改了学习率 ϵ、批量大小 B 或两者，使得温度 ϵ/B 在 epoch 1 到 1.5（SVHN）或 0.02 到 0.03（BW）之间减少了 16 倍。在所有情况下，我们看到简单噪声尺度增加了 16 倍，然后在 ϵ、B 重置后大致恢复到原始值。

items.en: In equilibrium, the noise scales vary in proportion to the inverse temperature, so that
items.zh: 在平衡状态下，噪声尺度与逆温度成比例变化，因此

items.en: It may seem surprising that higher temperature results in a smaller noise scale. The intuition is that at larger T𝑇T the neural network parameters are further from the minimum of the loss, or higher up the ‘walls’ of the potential, so that the gradient magnitude is larger relative to the variance.
items.zh: 更高的温度导致更小的噪声尺度可能令人惊讶。直觉是，在更大的 T 下，神经网络参数离损失最小值更远，或者位于势能‘壁’的更高处，因此梯度幅度相对于方差更大。

items.en: Of course the loss landscape will be much more complicated than this toy model, but we have also observed that this scaling rule provides a good empirical rule of thumb, even away from pure SGD. In particular, when we decay the learning rate ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon by a constant factor, we often find that the noise scale grows by roughly the same factor. ImageNet training provides an example in Figure 10. A more direct investigation of the relation between ℬsimplesubscriptℬsimple{\cal B}_{\rm simple} and T𝑇T is provided in Figure 15.
items.zh: 当然，损失景观比这个玩具模型复杂得多，但我们也观察到，即使远离纯 SGD，这个缩放规则也提供了一个良好的经验法则。特别是，当我们以常数因子衰减学习率 ϵ 时，我们经常发现噪声尺度大致以相同因子增长。ImageNet 训练在图 10 中提供了一个例子。对 ℬsimple 和 T 之间关系的更直接研究见图 15。

items.en: Since the noise depends primarily on the training temperature, and well-tuned training runs should have the same temperature at different batch sizes, the measured noise scale will also be consistent between optimally-tuned runs at different batch sizes.121212This suggests that we can use the noise scale to define the temperature via Equation C.2. Then, once we have tuned the learning rate and measured the noise scale at small batch size, we can tune the learning rate at larger batch sizes to the noise scale constant. Though we have not investigated this idea thoroughly, it could significantly simplify the problem of learning rate tuning at large batch size.. The noise scale then depends only on the temperature and the loss.
items.zh: 由于噪声主要取决于训练温度，并且良好调优的训练运行在不同批量大小下应具有相同的温度，因此测量的噪声尺度在最优调优的不同批量大小运行之间也将是一致的。121212这表明我们可以使用噪声尺度通过方程 C.2 定义温度。然后，一旦我们在小批量大小下调优了学习率并测量了噪声尺度，我们就可以在更大的批量大小下调优学习率以保持噪声尺度常数。虽然我们尚未彻底研究这个想法，但它可能显著简化大批量大小下学习率调优的问题。噪声尺度仅取决于温度和损失。

items.en: To summarize, the noise scale does not provide an optimal training temperature schedule, but it instead prescribes an optimal batch size at any given temperature.
items.zh: 总结来说，噪声尺度并不提供最优的训练温度调度，而是在任何给定温度下指定最优的批量大小。

items.en: Note that this result relies on the assumption that the optimizer has approached an effective equilibrium. We expect the equilibration timescale to be larger in the directions of low curvature, so that this effect will be strongest when the gradient points mostly in the large-curvature directions of the Hessian. It would be interesting to investigate the timescale for equilibration.

items.en: As one can see from Figure 4 and Section 3, both the measured ℬnoisesubscriptℬnoise\mathcal{B}_{{\rm noise}} and ℬsimplesubscriptℬsimple\mathcal{B}_{{\rm simple}}, as well as the empirical ℬcritsubscriptℬcrit\mathcal{B}_{{\rm crit}} fit to Equation 2.11 all increase by at least an order of magnitude during training. Thus its natural to ask if we should expect to improve efficiency by dynamically scaling the batch size B𝐵B in response. We will see that the predicted gains are relatively modest unless the ℬc​r​i​tsubscriptℬ𝑐𝑟𝑖𝑡{\cal B}_{crit} changes greatly during training, although preliminary empirical tests suggest the benefits may be larger than predicted.

full.secZh: E.1 确定性训练表现不佳

items.en: From the discussion of the noise scale in Section 2, we expect that at large batch size B≫ℬnoisemuch-greater-than𝐵subscriptℬnoiseB\gg\mathcal{B}_{\rm noise} we can obtain a very good estimate of the gradient. This would then suggest a minimally stochastic approach to training, where at each step one performs a line search of the true loss in the direction of the true gradient, and updates parameters accordingly.
items.zh: 从第2节关于噪声尺度的讨论中，我们预期在大批量B≫ℬ_noise时，我们可以获得梯度的非常好的估计。这将建议一种最小随机性的训练方法，即在每一步对真实梯度方向上的真实损失进行线搜索，并相应更新参数。

items.en: This nearly deterministic ‘greedient descent’ method performs poorly in practice [WRLG18]. While its first few steps tend to decrease the loss significantly, subsequent step sizes decrease rapidly and provide minimal further training progress. In fact, when training with a fixed learning rate, we have observed that training often tends towards a regime where the optimal step size (determined by a line search in the direction of the parameter update) is almost exactly half of the actual update magnitude. We have found that this phenomenon occurs regardless of the learning rate (scanning over several orders of magnitude), and seems common to a variety of different models, as shown in Figures 17 and 18. A natural interpretation of these results is that large Hessian directions are dominating the update [GARD18], so that training involves rapid oscillations, as seen in Figure 18 (see [Goh17] for an intuitive picture of these oscillations). Because of this, line searches do not appear to be useful in determining the optimal step size for a full training run.
items.zh: 这种近乎确定性的“贪婪下降”方法在实践中表现不佳[WRLG18]。虽然它的前几步往往显著降低损失，但随后的步长迅速减小，仅提供最小的进一步训练进展。事实上，当使用固定学习率训练时，我们观察到训练往往趋向于一个状态，其中最优步长（通过在参数更新方向上的线搜索确定）几乎正好是实际更新幅度的一半。我们发现无论学习率如何（扫描几个数量级），这一现象都会发生，并且似乎普遍存在于各种不同的模型中，如图17和18所示。对这些结果的一个自然解释是，大Hessian方向主导了更新[GARD18]，因此训练涉及快速振荡，如图18所示（参见[Goh17]对这些振荡的直观描述）。因此，线搜索似乎对确定完整训练运行的最优步长没有帮助。

items.en: Throughout the paper we have studied the noise scale as a function of the training loss or RL score. But for non-RL tasks, it is also interesting to study the relationship between the noise scale and the critical batch size associated with minimization of the test loss. The difference between the training and test results provides information about generalization. In Figure 19 we report results using the test loss for the small image classification datasets.
items.zh: 在整篇论文中，我们研究了噪声尺度作为训练损失或RL分数的函数。但对于非RL任务，研究噪声尺度与最小化测试损失相关的临界批量大小之间的关系也很有趣。训练和测试结果之间的差异提供了关于泛化的信息。在图19中，我们报告了使用小图像分类数据集测试损失的结果。

items.en: As expected, early in training there is no difference between train and test results. However, at the very end of training we observe a small dip in ℬcritsubscriptℬcrit{\cal B}_{\rm crit} for the test loss, which appears to occur consistently across datasets. It would be very interesting to further investigate this phenomenon in the future.
items.zh: 正如预期，训练早期训练和测试结果之间没有差异。然而，在训练的最后阶段，我们观察到测试损失的ℬ_crit出现小幅下降，这似乎在各个数据集上一致出现。未来进一步研究这一现象将非常有趣。
